name: Darklord Desire
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>堕</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ディザイア
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned. You can Tribute Summon this card by Tributing 1 Fairy-Type monster. Once per turn: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; this card loses exactly 1000 ATK, and if it does, send that target to the Graveyard.

action: Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
